steps.title: Read the discovery frame
steps.content: The sentence says genetic research only recently identified the ancestor of summer squash as the wild Johnny gourd. The blank needs a verb that can show research making an ancestry fact known.

steps.title: Reject wrong actions
steps.content: B means formally requested, which research cannot do to an ancestor. C means enlarged, and D means urged or supported; neither expresses scientific identification. The remaining verb fits the pattern research revealed something to be true. The answer is A.
